aljazeera.title: Israeli settlers intensify attacks in West Bank, targeting water supplies

monitor_the_situation.title: US Launches Three Nights of Strikes on Iran

— S4 · Conflict · Tehran, Iran · 19h ago. President Trump confirms US forces conducted three consecutive nights of airstrikes on Iran in response to attacks on commercial shipping, marking a major escalation.

Israeli Settlers Intensify Attacks in West Bank, Targeting Water Supplies
— S3 · Conflict · West Bank, Palestine · 4m ago. Israeli settlers escalate attacks on Palestinians in the West Bank, specifically targeting water infrastructure, marking a sharp increase in violence.
